subject: Map all preprocessing scripts across 6 categories
description: List all preprocessing scripts in thesis/data/preprocessing/nielsen/. For each category (CSD, Danskvand, Energidrikke, RTD, Totalbeer, and shared), identify step scripts (pre_CATEGORY_N_*.py) and orchestrators. Verify paths match PATHS.py constants. Output: inventory.json with {category: {step: filepath, ...}}
